---
title: Final Project
subtitle: Datasci 350
author: Danilo Freire
date: 2026-04-21
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
editor:
  render-on-save: true
---

# Introduction to Our Project

## Code for Data Cleaning Enrollment Data
```{sql}

```

## Code for Data Cleaning Trained Teacher Data
```{sql}

```

# Data Cleaning

We only included columns 

Africa Eastern and Southern
AFE
Africa Western and Central
AFW
Arab World
ARB
Australia
AUS
East Asia & Pacific
EAS
European Union
EUU
Latin America & Caribbean
LCN
North America
NAC
South Asia
SAS
Low income
LIC
Lower middle income
LMC
Upper middle income
UMC
High income
HIC

And only years 2000-2023


# Data Analysis




# Conclusion
